items.title: New Fed chair, Base's Azul upgrade, corporate earnings: Crypto Week Ahead
items.summary: Your look at what's coming in the week starting May 11.

items.title: Bored Ape NFTs are finally making a comeback as crypto traders rediscover their appetite for risk
items.summary: BAYC floor prices have doubled in a month as traders rotate back into speculative crypto bets, reviving hopes of a broader NFT recovery.

items.title: Ethereum down 35% versus Bitcoin in a year: Will the ETH price downtrend continue?
items.summary: Ethereum’s ongoing downtrend against Bitcoin mirrors the bearish structure seen in 2024–2025, raising the risk of another 40% decline.

items.title: Santiment flags risk as crypto bullish talk spikes while BTC holds $80K
items.summary: The increase in bullish versus bearish crypto commentary on social media has Santiment warning that the recent crypto market rally may be short-lived.

items.title: CZ says crypto exchange rivals opposed his pardon bid
items.summary: Binance co-founder Changpeng “CZ” Zhao said rival crypto exchanges were concerned a pardon could pave the way for Binance to return to the US market.

items.title: It might be too late for bitcoin’s quantum migration, Project Eleven report argues
items.summary: Quantum computing does not only pose a risk to up to $3 trillion in digital assets, it also threatens the security of banking systems, military communications, digital identities and more, Project Eleven’s report warns.

items.title: Why a 2017 Linux bug is now a major concern for the crypto industry
items.summary: The “Copy Fail” Linux bug could impact crypto infrastructure that relies on Linux servers, highlighting growing cybersecurity risks in the digital asset industry. Format: Explained

items.title: Crypto exchanges pushed US lawmakers to bar provision on risky tokens: Report
items.summary: Coinbase, Kraken and Gemini reportedly pressed senators to remove language requiring listed tokens to be “not readily susceptible to manipulation."

items.title: Estonia's FSA issues investor warning about Zondacrypto
items.summary: The warning comes after Polish authorities reportedly opened an investigation into Zondacrypto amid customer complaints about withdrawals.

items.title: Trailmark turns code into graphs
items.summary: We’re open-sourcing Trailmark, a library that parses source code into a queryable call graph of functions, classes, call relationships, and semantic metadata, then exposes that graph through a Python API that Claude skills can call directly. Install it now: uv pip install trailma

items.title: Bitcoin, Nasdaq investors are celebrating, while U.S. consumers turn gloomy
items.summary: Bitcoin and Nasdaq have rallied sharply, but U.S. consumer sentiment has fallen to historic lows, highlighting a widening Wall Street–Main Street divide.

items.title: Bitcoin mining pools with 75% of BTC hashrate join open standard for block construction
items.summary: Foundry, AntPool, F2Pool, SpiderPool, and MARA Pool are among seven pools joining the Stratum V2 working group, putting nearly three-quarters of global bitcoin hashrate behind a protocol that returns block construction decisions to individual miners.

items.title: XRP spikes 2.5%, beating bitcoin and ether, in breakout above $1.45
items.summary: Sharp move through resistance came with one of the biggest volume spikes in weeks, though profit-taking quickly emerged near session highs.

items.title: A bitcoin whale that went silent in 2013 moves $40 million in BTC
items.summary: A long-dormant whale woke up Sunday, moving millions worth of bitcoin on-chain.

items.title: Whitehat returns $190K to Renegade hours after hacking the protocol
items.summary: The whitehat hacker said the decision to exploit Renegade’s dark pool was made to protect the funds and safety of DeFi users.

items.title: England central banker says global stablecoin rules will ‘wrestle’ with US
items.summary: Bank of England Governor Andrew Bailey says regulators will have to deal with the US when forming global stablecoin standards.

items.title: SUI spikes 50% amid staking moves, zero-fee stablecoins, privacy push
items.summary: Adeniyi Abiodun, co-founder of Mysten Labs, announced at an event in Miami plans for zero-fee stablecoin transfers on Sui and reiterated the ambition to add private transactions.

items.title: Privacy advocates slam reCAPTCHA update they say locks out de-Googled phones
items.summary: Privacy-conscious internet users are being “demoted” from second to third-class netizens, said Bitcoiner Jameson Lopp.

items.title: Bitcoin rallies 2.3% after Trump calls Iran peace proposal ‘totally unacceptable’
items.summary: 10x Research CEO Markus Thielen said Bitcoin’s strength above $80,000 could be supported by two favorable decisions in the US Senate this week.

items.title: Policy at Consensus Miami: State of Crypto
items.summary: This was a hectic week.
